# SRC027 - How Generative AI Is Shaping the Future of Marketing

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | AI Marketing |
| Authors / source | Grewal, Satornino, Davenport & Guha |
| Year | 2024 |
| Source type | Peer-reviewed open-access article |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11747-024-01064-3](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11747-024-01064-3) |

## Bias / limitation

Academic; future-looking.

## Core takeaway

GenAI changes customer interaction, content creation, insights, and marketing operations.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to frame GenAI as operating-system change, not just copywriting acceleration.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC027
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:
- What it does not prove:
- Ad tactic suggested:
- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
